shots.prompt: The glowing tendrils grow into a vast bioluminescent jungle, enormous breathing leaves and vines pulsing with neon light in the dark. Lush, seamless continuation.
Giant luminous flowers slowly open across the jungle, and at the center of each bloom is a gently blinking eye, all turning together. Beautiful and uncanny.
The whole forest breathes as one, trunks expanding and contracting, glowing spores drifting upward like sparks. Hypnotic living motion.
Thousands of fireflies of colored light swirl together and arrange into shifting constellations and sacred geometry above the canopy. Mesmerizing swarm.
